{{Quote|Someone killed a Jedi ''Master'', you laserbrain!|Chal Tozr to his partner Gwad Raatu|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Tempest">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref>}}
'''Chal Tozr''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] who worked for the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] with the [[Police rank|rank]] of [[Detective/Legends|detective]]. He, along with his partner [[Gwad Raatu]], were sent to investigate the [[Duel in the Fellowship Plaza|death]] of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Tresina Lobi]]. He later accompanied Jedi Masters [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] in their investigation of [[Lumiya]]'s [[Apartment three hundred seven twelve|apartment]] .

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
